name: Bone Devil
damage_resistances: Bludgeoning, Piercing, and Slashing from nonmagical attacks that aren't silvered

traits.name: Devil's Sight
traits.description: The devil can see normally in Darkness, both magical and nonmagical, within 120 feet of itself.

traits.name: Magic Resistance
traits.description: The devil has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.description: The devil makes three attacks: two Claw attacks and one Sting attack.

actions.name: Claw
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +9, reach 10 ft. Hit: 8 (1d8 + 4) Slashing damage.

actions.name: Sting
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +9, reach 10 ft. Hit: 13 (2d8 + 4) Piercing damage plus 17 (5d6) Poison damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 17 Constitution saving throw or have the Poisoned condition for 1 minute. The target can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

tactical_info.tactics: Uses reach attacks to control battlefield, focuses sting on spellcasters, flies to maintain advantage
tactical_info.weaknesses: Vulnerable to silvered weapons, relies on reach advantage
